emails.subject: Re: Letter to John Pope
emails.body: Re: Letter to John Pope This is fine with me. Should we send a BCC to Dave Cook and Howard Hawks. Richard B Sanders 01/13/2000 03:11 PM Sent by: Twanda Sweet

emails.subject: Re: Letter to John Pope
emails.body: Re: Letter to John Pope Send it to everyone you believe should get it. Unless I hear otherwise from you, I will assume you are going to send the letter with attachments today
